post0.title: Intro
post0.content: > Is a program really going to be able to identify East Asians accurately? :monocle_face: - hide: false - toc: true - badges: true - comments: true - categories: [fastai] . Working in natural language processing (NLP), I've learned a lot about how technology can interact with language to create some of the world's leading products like Siri, Alexa, or Google Translate. . When I tell people what my area of expertise is, I often hear statements like, "Oh, that sounds complicated", or "I could never do that". A lot of people talk about how programming seems too difficult or how anything STEM just scares them. . BUT I think the same could be said for any area of expertise! I mean, I still take my car to the shop for an oil change and they say that's pretty easy :eyes: . Much like working on a car or cooking in the kitchen, machine learning (ML) comes with a bunch of tools ready to make your life a lot easier. . The same way chefs specialize in taking ingredients and cooking dishes, data scientists specialize in taking data and building ML models. . In this post, we'll take our first step towards becoming a data scientist the same way you might've started cooking -- with an Easy Bake Oven! . [Easy Bake Oven Picture Here] . I know that sounds ridiculous, but with the help of fast.ai, building deep learning models has become as easy as pie. . In the first two lessons, they show just how easy it is to build a model-- from gathering the data to deploying a website to have users interact with the model. . So in this post, we'll replicate the work in the lesson to try and answer the following question: . Can a machine learning model classify whether a person is Chinese, Japanese, or Korean? . Let's jump right into it then! . Gathering Data . clean . To download images with Bing Image Search, sign up at Microsoft Azure for a free account. You will be given a key, which you can copy and enter in a cell as follows (replacing 'XXX' with your key and executing it): . key = os.environ.get('AZURE_SEARCH_KEY', 'd8b42ffae6c84d7c8b6e74a44e82355e') . # because changes to Bing API !pip install bing-image-downloader from bing_image_downloader import downloader . page1.title: About Me
page1.content: Hi there! . My name is Kenny. . I’m a computational linguist blogging to share my experiences learning from online classes like fast.ai. . I also plan to share blog posts centered around exploring Japanese natural language processing and various hurdles I face as work on my projects. . To find more info about my work or education, please feel free to visit my [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kennywlino/. .
